name: File Read
description: Read file contents with optional line range selection. Supports text files of any type. Returns content with line numbers for easy reference.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path (relative to project root or absolute)

properties.name: end
properties.description: End line (inclusive, -1 for end of file)

outputDescription: Object with {content, totalLines, path}. Content includes line numbers prefixed to each line.
author: openspace
